use_cases: Displaying achievement badges on user profile pages
Showing award/certificate visuals in credentialing systems
Presenting level-based recognition in gamification features
Creating decorative award stamps for milestone celebrations
Building badge collections in learning management systems
ai_summary: A versatile awards and badges component with six distinct visual variants (stamp, award, certificate, badge, sticker, id-card) and four achievement levels (bronze, silver, gold, platinum). Supports customizable titles, descriptions, dates, and recipients with gradient color schemes. Ideal for displaying achievement systems, credential displays, and gamification elements in SaaS applications.
